RegnalYear.Monarch: Elizabeth II 芒聙聯 1 Charles III

Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act and the Companies芒聙聶 Creditors Arrangement Act (public institutions)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act and the Companies芒聙聶 Creditors Arrangement Act (public institutions)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act and the Companies芒聙聶 Creditors Arrangement Act to exclude certain public institutions from their application.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The definition corporation in section 2 of the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act is replaced by the following:

Definition.Text: corporation芒聙聜means a company or legal person that is incorporated by or under an Act of Parliament or of the legislature of a province, an incorporated company, wherever incorporated, that is authorized to carry on business in Canada or has an office or property in Canada or an income trust, but does not include

Paragraph.Text: banks and authorized foreign banks within the meaning of section 2 of the Bank Act,

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: public institutions that receive government operating grants and that are subject to federal or provincial policy directives and operating procedures related to governance, accountability, finance and administration; (personne morale)

Section.Text: The definition company in subsection 2(1) of the Companies芒聙聶 Creditors Arrangement Act is replaced by the following:

Definition.Text: company芒聙聜means any company, corporation or legal person incorporated by or under an Act of Parliament or of the legislature of a province, any incorporated company having assets or doing business in Canada, wherever incorporated, and any income trust, but does not include

Paragraph.Text: banks and authorized foreign banks within the meaning of section 2 of the Bank Act,
companies to which the Trust and Loan Companies Act applies, or

Paragraph.Label: (e)
Paragraph.Text: public institutions that receive government operating grants and that are subject to federal or provincial policy directives and operating procedures related to governance, accountability, finance and administration; (compagnie)
